title: kniphofia angustifolia
intro: Kniphofia angustifolia, also known as Red Hot Poker or Narrow-leaved Red Hot Poker, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asphodelaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties, which aid in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The plant's extracts have been found to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and supporting the immune system. Kniphofia angustifolia can be prepared into herbal remedies like teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a valuable resource for natural healing.
